description: Context tracking the page type and user's locale settings. Attached to every event.

pageType.description: Type of page the user was on when the event fired. Examples: "title_detail", "home", "popular", "search", "onboarding", "new", "watchlist".

appLocale.description: The user's selected country/market setting (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code, uppercase). Examples: "DE", "GB", "FR", "US". This is the market the user chose in their settings — NOT the same as geo_country (which is IP-based physical location). A user in Germany may have appLocale set to "GB" if they browse UK content.

appLanguage.description: The user's selected UI language (ISO 639-1 code). Examples: "en", "de", "fr". Controls which language the JustWatch interface is displayed in.

pageViewUuid.description: UUID linking this event to its parent page view event. All events that happen on the same page share the same pageViewUuid. Use to group events by page visit.

pageEntryMode.description: How the user arrived at this page. Values: "seo" (from search engine), "direct" (typed URL or bookmark), "navigation" (internal link), "back" (browser back), "middle click" (opened in new tab). Default: "direct".
